_comment: White-label base theme — tenant-overridable brand layer. Only Tier 2 brand tokens are overridable. Tier 1 primitives and Tier 3 component tokens are immutable and derived automatically.

primary.description: Primary brand color — override per tenant

ar.description: Arabic font — tenant can override with licensed Arabic font

en.description: English font — tenant can override with Google Font

logo-url.description: Primary logo. Override with tenant CDN URL.

base.description: Tenant can set to 0 for sharp corners or full for pill style
